Data Fields

java_lang_String_t Struct Reference

#include <java_lang_String.h>

Data Fields

array_t * value
 Chars of the string.
header_t header
 Embedded header.
struct java_lang_String_t * next
 Next string in the bucket.
uint32_t count
 Number of characters.
uint32_t cachedHashCode
 Cached hash-code.
uint32_t offset
 Start offset inside the value array.

Detailed Description

java.lang.String instance layout

Notice that the 'next' pointer is in the non-reference area of the object, this is due to the fact that it is handled explicitely by the garbage collector
